subcodes.title: A Vaaroving i wan a Vaarmuxosing (Marriage)
subcodes.first_line:
## A Vaaroving i wan a Vaarmuxosing (Marriage)

BAHA´I MARRIAGE:

La maskan a Kitáb-i-Aqdas o a Buk Faarala si Bahá’u’ll
subcodes.notes: Theory: Marriage section containing Aqdas K63 verse by BH ("Enter into wedlock, O people") and AB03461MAR formula. Label: A Vaaroving i wan a Vaarmuxosing (Marriage) in Nali language (Papua New Guinea). Needs split into two records. Challenge: Nali is a PNG language with extremely limited reference material.
